case_title: OTIS WINNFIELD VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINNFIELD, OTIS AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY PENG, BAYARDO DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-07-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-04-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-15-2018

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-18-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-07-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-05-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINNFIELD, OTIS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR FEB-05-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE DEC-18-2018 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINNFIELD, OTIS
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
